Plaintiffs Rosalinda Sharp And John J. Sharp'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction (Per Ex Parte Order Of 06/02/10)
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Continued To Jul-14-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiffs Rosalinda Sharp and John J. Sharp's Order to Show Cause re Preliminary Injunction (Per Ex Parte Order of 06/02/10). Appearances: Richard J. Reynolds, Esq. of Turner, Reynolds, Greco & O'Hara, (949) 474-6900 Appearing thru CourtCall for Defendants Ing Bank FSB, and MTC Financial, Inc. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Hearing on Order to Show cause is continued to 7/14/2010 per CCP section 527(d)(4). Temporary Retraining Order to remain in effect. Mr. Reynolds to prepare Order. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
